name: skill performance report enumerates one section per skill with its latency p50 metric
command:
mkdir -p skills .claude-tdd-pro/skills && printf 'flow-guard:
  latency_p50_ms: 120
profile-suggest:
  latency_p50_ms: 80
' > .claude-tdd-pro/skills/perf-stats.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/perf.sh" --stats .claude-tdd-pro/skills/perf-stats.yaml --out skills/PERF.md --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '## flow-guard' skills/PERF.md && grep -q 'latency_p50_ms: 120' skills/PERF.md && echo ok 1>&2
